THE STATUS CONFERENCE OF 8/17/05 IS VACATED. THE CASE IS SET FOR TRIAL ON 3/14/05 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 3/4/05 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. PARTIES STIPULATE TO G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO, CLERKS DIANNE HAKEWILL, VERA MU, REPORTER JOANN BRYCE.
